title: Add divisions subsection with heading and boxed cards under About section

requirements.text: Update the About section (frontend/src/components/sections/About.tsx) to include an additional subsection under the existing "About Guru & Associates" content: add a separate heading (English) reading "Guru & Associates is into" placed above a 3-card grid of boxed items styled consistently with the existing "Expert Guidance" feature cards, and ensure the three boxes display these exact titles: (1) "GURU & ASSOCIATE WEALTH CREATOR" (2) "G.P. ASSOCIATE LEGAL ADVISOR" (3) "GURU & ASSOCIATE PRODUCTION , DIRECTOR , FILM".

quotes: ADD MORE SECTION UNDER "About Guru & Associates" MAKE BOXES LIKE "Expert Guidance", ETC. MAKE SEPERATE HEADING GURU & ASSOCIATE IS INTO IN THOSE BOXES ADD FIRST BOX  1. GURU & ASSOCIATE WEALTH CREATOR,  SECOUND BOX 2. G.P. ASSOCIATE LEGAL ADVISOR , THIRD BOX  3. GURU & ASSOCIATE PRODUCTION , DIRECTOR , FILM

acceptanceCriteria: The About section shows a new subsection heading with the exact English text: "Guru & Associates is into".
Directly below that heading, there is a responsive 3-column (desktop) grid of three boxed cards.
Each card displays the exact titles: "GURU & ASSOCIATE WEALTH CREATOR", "G.P. ASSOCIATE LEGAL ADVISOR", and "GURU & ASSOCIATE PRODUCTION , DIRECTOR , FILM".
The three new boxes use the same visual card treatment as the existing feature cards (boxed layout with border/rounded corners/consistent spacing and hover behavior).

constraints: Frontend immutable paths must not be edited: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui.
Do not add backend functionality; this is a static content/layout change in the About section only.
nonGoals: Do not add new pages or routes.
Do not implement any backend storage or APIs for the About section content.
Do not change the existing feature-card titles (e.g., "Expert Guidance") unless required for layout consistency.
